fallback_actions.summary: Stage a local draft and defer publish or replay until revalidation succeeds.
Inspect draft-versus-publish truth, metadata sensitivity, and replay constraints.
Export or duplicate the draft to a distinct target instead of overwriting the provider-linked object.
Compare the staged draft with the current publish basis or replay target before continuing.

notes: Local drafts remain distinct from provider-owned publish truth.
scenario: A provider-linked local draft keeps logical-target ambiguity visible, stages locally first, and makes AI apply rebase or abort before any publish-later replay.
